overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through a foggy, neon-lit city at night. The journey progresses from a main arterial road under the San Joaquin overpass, through commercial districts with gas stations and skyscrapers, into grittier industrial backstreets with graffiti, and finally through an underpass. The atmosphere is dense with fog, reflecting the colorful neon advertisements and streetlights off the wet asphalt.

events.description: traffic light at San Joaquin overpass changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: cruising through foggy streets following a red vehicle ahead toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with red background and blue neon graphics displaying advertisements
highway overpass sign with 'San Joaquin' text illuminated in red neon
multi-story office building with grid-patterned windows glowing with interior lights
circular neon sign mounted on a pole, glowing white and red
tall street lamp with dual horizontal lights illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night drive down a wet multi-lane city street. Neon signs and billboards illuminate the haze, with a prominent red digital billboard on the left and the San Joaquin overpass sign visible ahead. The vehicle follows traffic toward the overpass as the traffic light changes from red to green.

events.description: passes underneath the San Joaquin overpass into the intersection area
executes a sharp right turn at the intersection onto a side street

agents.ego_description: passing under the overpass and making a right turn while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on the sidewalk and crossing the side street

entered.detail: contemporary building facade with blue neon accent lighting along the roofline
concrete building with large white '06' numerals illuminated on the side
gas station with illuminated canopy and convenience store lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the San Joaquin overpass, briefly entering a darker, semi-covered space before emerging into a busy intersection. As the camera turns right, pedestrians appear on the sidewalks, and new buildings come into view including a gas station and a building marked with '06'. The red billboard and overpass sign fall behind as the vehicle changes direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with corporate towers and gas station

events.description: futuristic skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting become visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: cruising past the gas station while heading toward the illuminated downtown towers

entered.detail: tall slender skyscrapers covered in vertical blue and red neon light strips piercing the fog
large vertical billboard featuring a bald man with 'HATE YOUR HEART' text in red neon
low-rise industrial building with corrugated metal exterior and loading docks

segments.scene_description: Driving through a commercial district, the gas station remains visible on the left while futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline ahead. The environment shifts to show more corporate architecture mixed with industrial buildings. A prominent 'HATE YOUR HEART' billboard appears on the right as the vehicle progresses down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial backstreets with heavy graffiti and underpass

events.description: entering grittier industrial area with extensive wall graffiti and decayed buildings
entering covered underpass beneath highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow industrial streets lined with graffiti-covered walls toward the underpass

entered.detail: concrete industrial building with 'NO REGRETS' spray-painted in large black letters
food vendor cart with red and white striped awning on the sidewalk
covered roadway passage beneath concrete highway overpasses with dim lighting
concrete sound barrier wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a grittier industrial zone characterized by graffiti-covered walls including a building marked 'NO REGRETS'. A striped food cart sits on the left sidewalk. The street narrows as the vehicle approaches and enters a dark underpass tunnel, with the futuristic towers and previous commercial elements disappearing from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass exit returning to main avenue

events.description: exiting the underpass back onto the open main avenue with visible billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the underpass and merging back onto the wider main road

entered.detail: the same large red billboard with blue graphics from the beginning of the drive, now visible again

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the dark underpass back into the open city street, with the red digital billboard from the start of the journey becoming visible again on the left. The environment returns to the wider avenue format with better lighting, completing the loop through the city's diverse districts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from a wide arterial road into gritty industrial backstreets before returning to a bright city avenue. It begins on a wet, multi-lane street where red digital billboards pierce through a dense fog, moving forward as a traffic light turns green to pass under the San Joaquin overpass. As the vehicle turns right and emerges from the shadows of the overpass, the scene shifts into a commercial district where gas stations and towering futuristic skyscrapers replace the initial haze. The environment then grows grittier, moving past graffiti-covered walls and a striped food cart before the street narrows and plunges into the darkness of an underpass tunnel. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel back into the open city air, where the lighting brightens and the original red digital billboard reappears on the left to complete the loop.
